ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code of the stock */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the stock */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the stock */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the stock in the market */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock exchange is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used by the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange_stocks" (
  "exchange_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange-stock combination */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was listed on the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "strategy" TEXT /* Investment strategy of the portfolio */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio-stock combination */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio-stock combination */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (buy/sell) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was made */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the transaction was made */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_portfolio_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_stock_id") REFERENCES portfolio_stocks ("portfolio_stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g. price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the news article is related to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
